commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the ClawHub CLI help gate to resolve the stored user's role, hide moderator/admin root and package commands by audience, and expand admin help tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main exposes package moderation/operator commands in normal help, while the PR head makes -V/--cli-version fall into help-role lookup. I did not execute the PR branch because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can exempt version flags from help-role lookup and add the required changelog entry on the PR branch.
